scope: Create a Python script named 'hello_world.py' that prints the text 'Hello, World!' to the console when executed.

tasks.title: Implement hello_world.py script
tasks.description: Create a Python file named 'hello_world.py'. Implement a single function or method that prints 'Hello, World!' to the console using print(). Ensure the script runs this function when executed. Tests: Run the script and verify it outputs 'Hello, World!'.
